testcase.name: testConvertFromJsonString
testcase.system-out:
Direct JSON String Conversion: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:smart="http://smartengine.org/schema/process" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="process_1763379016790_def" version="1.0.0" targetNamespace="Examples"> <process id="process_1763379016790" version="1.0.0" name="新建流程"> <startEvent id="startEvent-1763379018399" name="开始"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379019795" name="员工申请" priority="50"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379023480" name="领导审批" priority="50"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379027894" name="HR审批" priority="50"/> <endEvent id="endEvent-1763379036897" name="结束"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379021762" name="" sourceRef="startEvent-1763379018399" targetRef="userTask-1763379019795"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379025162" name="请假天数< 3天" sourceRef="userTask-1763379019795" targetRef="userTask-1763379023480"> <conditionExpression xsi:type="mvel">leaveDays < 3</conditionExpression> </sequenceFlow> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379030029" name="请假天数 >=3天" sourceRef="userTask-1763379019795" targetRef="userTask-1763379027894"> <conditionExpression xsi:type="mvel">leaveDays >=3</conditionExpression> </sequenceFlow> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379038895" name="" sourceRef="userTask-1763379023480" targetRef="endEvent-1763379036897"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379041329" name="" sourceRef="userTask-1763379027894" targetRef="endEvent-1763379036897"/> </process> </definitions>

testcase.name: testConvertWithServiceTask
testcase.system-out:
Service Task Process BPMN XML: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:smart="http://smartengine.org/schema/process" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="service-task-process_def" version="1.0.0" targetNamespace="Examples"> <process id="service-task-process" version="1.0.0" name="服务任务流程"> <startEvent id="start-1" name="开始"/> <serviceTask id="service-1" name="服务任务" smart:class="com.example.MyService"/> <endEvent id="end-1" name="结束"/> <sequenceFlow id="flow-1" name="" sourceRef="start-1" targetRef="service-1"/> <sequenceFlow id="flow-2" name="" sourceRef="service-1" targetRef="end-1"/> </process> </definitions>

testcase.name: testConvertSimpleProcess
testcase.system-out:
Simple Process BPMN XML: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:smart="http://smartengine.org/schema/process" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="simple-process_def" version="1.0.0" targetNamespace="Examples"> <process id="simple-process" version="1.0.0" name="简单流程"> <startEvent id="start-1" name="开始"/> <endEvent id="end-1" name="结束"/> <sequenceFlow id="flow-1" name="" sourceRef="start-1" targetRef="end-1"/> </process> </definitions>

testcase.name: testConvertProcessJson
testcase.system-out:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:smart="http://smartengine.org/schema/process" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="process_1763379016790_def" version="1.0.0" targetNamespace="Examples"> <process id="process_1763379016790" version="1.0.0" name="新建流程"> <startEvent id="startEvent-1763379018399" name="开始"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379019795" name="员工申请" priority="50"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379023480" name="领导审批" priority="50"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379027894" name="HR审批" priority="50"/> <endEvent id="endEvent-1763379036897" name="结束"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379021762" name="" sourceRef="startEvent-1763379018399" targetRef="userTask-1763379019795"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379025162" name="请假天数< 3天" sourceRef="userTask-1763379019795" targetRef="userTask-1763379023480"> <conditionExpression xsi:type="mvel">leaveDays < 3</conditionExpression> </sequenceFlow> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379030029" name="请假天数 >=3天" sourceRef="userTask-1763379019795" targetRef="userTask-1763379027894"> <conditionExpression xsi:type="mvel">leaveDays >=3</conditionExpression> </sequenceFlow> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379038895" name="" sourceRef="userTask-1763379023480" targetRef="endEvent-1763379036897"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379041329" name="" sourceRef="userTask-1763379027894" targetRef="endEvent-1763379036897"/> </process> </definitions>
Generated BPMN XML: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:smart="http://smartengine.org/schema/process" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="process_1763379016790_def" version="1.0.0" targetNamespace="Examples"> <process id="process_1763379016790" version="1.0.0" name="新建流程"> <startEvent id="startEvent-1763379018399" name="开始"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379019795" name="员工申请" priority="50"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379023480" name="领导审批" priority="50"/> <userTask id="userTask-1763379027894" name="HR审批" priority="50"/> <endEvent id="endEvent-1763379036897" name="结束"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379021762" name="" sourceRef="startEvent-1763379018399" targetRef="userTask-1763379019795"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379025162" name="请假天数< 3天" sourceRef="userTask-1763379019795" targetRef="userTask-1763379023480"> <conditionExpression xsi:type="mvel">leaveDays < 3</conditionExpression> </sequenceFlow> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379030029" name="请假天数 >=3天" sourceRef="userTask-1763379019795" targetRef="userTask-1763379027894"> <conditionExpression xsi:type="mvel">leaveDays >=3</conditionExpression> </sequenceFlow> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379038895" name="" sourceRef="userTask-1763379023480" targetRef="endEvent-1763379036897"/> <sequenceFlow id="edge-1763379041329" name="" sourceRef="userTask-1763379027894" targetRef="endEvent-1763379036897"/> </process> </definitions>

testcase.name: testConvertWithGateways
testcase.system-out:
Gateway Process BPMN XML: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:smart="http://smartengine.org/schema/process" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="gateway-process_def" version="1.0.0" targetNamespace="Examples"> <process id="gateway-process" version="1.0.0" name="网关流程"> <startEvent id="start-1" name="开始"/> <exclusiveGateway id="gw-1" name="排他网关"/> <parallelGateway id="gw-2" name="并行网关"/> <endEvent id="end-1" name="结束"/> <sequenceFlow id="flow-1" name="" sourceRef="start-1" targetRef="gw-1"/> <sequenceFlow id="flow-2" name="" sourceRef="gw-1" targetRef="gw-2"/> <sequenceFlow id="flow-3" name="" sourceRef="gw-2" targetRef="end-1"/> </process> </definitions>
